stemHtml: During an overwater flight, all engines on a commercial multi-engined jet aircraft fail and you are in a state of emergency. You decide to make an emergency landing (ditching). Which of the following has the highest priority?

options.a: Instruct all passengers to put on, and inflate, their lifejackets.
options.b: Make sure that the passengers remain seated.
options.c: Let someone know your plans and needs.
